docs/constitution.md, audit quality, map existing models and metrics, and
document contradictions. Do NOT read docs/hypothesis-doc.md.

- Where to find data sources (paths, databases, APIs)
- Any known documentation gaps ("there's no docs for the legacy model")
- Access constraints ("I don't have credentials for the production DB")
